name: @umbraculum/brewery-i18n
description: Brewery-vertical locale bundles (en/it JSON). Merged into app-facing catalogs by @umbraculum/i18n getSharedMessages(); omit when UMBRACULUM_MODULE_PROFILE=platform.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-json.mjs
